title: Spartan and Fire: RLCraft Edition
description: A fork of Spartan and Fire, modified for use in the RLCraft modpack by fixing some bugs and backporting newer features for use with older Ice and Fire.
body:
NOTICE: This is a fork of "[Spartan and Fire](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spartan-and-fire)" by cbkovak, for the original mod please go to their page, all credits go to them and their contributors.
This fork is made specifically for use in RLCraft, it is built to use Ice and Fire 1.7.1, use the original mod if you want to use any other Ice and Fire version.

This mod takes materials from the mod Ice and Fire (Dragon bone, Jungle and Desert Myrmex, Iced Dragonbone, Flamed Dragonbone, etc.) and adds Spartan Weaponry weapons using those materials, with their own weapon effects, like bonus damage against certain dragons.
This edition is built for the modpack RLCraft which uses an older version of Ice and Fire, 1.7.1, and backports newer changes to Spartan and Fire while keeping compatibility with Ice and Fire 1.7.1.
